---
title: "AEGIS Overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AEGIS Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
options(rmarkdown.html_vignette.check_title = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(AEGIS)
```

## Purpose

AEGIS provides a minimal, reproducible workflow for spatial deconvolution audit on Seurat objects.

## P2 workflow

```{r}
data("aegis_example", package = "AEGIS")

deconv <- simulate_deconv_results(aegis_example, seed = 123)
obj <- as_aegis(aegis_example, deconv)
obj <- audit_basic(obj)

knitr::kable(obj$audit$basic$summary)
```
